code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut i = 0
  mut have = false
  mut max_v = 0
  mut min_v = 0
  mut in_num = false
  mut cur = 0
  mut sign = 1
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    let is_digit = b >= 48 and b <= 57
    let is_sign = b == 45 or b == 43
    if is_digit
      if not in_num
        in_num = true
        cur = 0
        sign = 1
      end
      cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
    else if is_sign and not in_num
      in_num = true
      cur = 0
      if b == 45
        sign = -1
      else
        sign = 1
      end
    else
      if in_num
        let v = cur * sign
        if not have
          max_v = v
          min_v = v
          have = true
        else
          if v > max_v
            max_v = v
          end
          if v < min_v
            min_v = v
          end
        end
        in_num = false
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if in_num
    let v = cur * sign
    if not have
      max_v = v
      min_v = v
      have = true
    else
      if v > max_v
        max_v = v
      end
      if v < min_v
        min_v = v
      end
    end
  end
  println("max=#{max_v}")
  println("min=#{min_v}")
end
